title: Characteristic ideal of the fine Selmer group and results on $Œº$-invariance under isogeny in the function field case

errors.description: The proof of Proposition 4.6 contains a mistake that affects the validity of subsequent results (including Theorem 4.9), likely due to a faulty argument or incorrect application of an equation, as acknowledged by a correction in a later preprint.

The error in the proof of Theorem 5.1 involves a flaw or gap in the logical reasoning or calculations that invalidates the original proof, and a corrected version has been provided in arXiv:2407.21431.
